notes: Substrate-class tasks: deterministic bytes-in/bytes-out compute, language-neutral. Vectors are the full acceptance contract; prompts state exactly what solutions receive and must emit.

tasks.title: Uppercase ASCII
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Output the same bytes with ASCII lowercase letters a-z converted to uppercase. All other bytes pass through unchanged.

tasks.title: Count newline bytes
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Output the number of 0x0A (newline) bytes as decimal ASCII digits with no trailing newline.

tasks.title: Sum integer lines
tasks.prompt: Input is zero or more lines, each a non-negative decimal integer (< 1000000), separated by 0x0A newlines; a trailing newline may be absent and empty lines must be ignored. Output the sum as decimal ASCII with no trailing newline.

tasks.title: Most frequent word
tasks.prompt: Tokenize input into words: maximal runs of ASCII letters a-z/A-Z, lowercased; every other byte separates words. Output 'word count' (single 0x20 between word and decimal count, no trailing newline) for the most frequent word; break count ties by lexicographically smallest word. Input contains at least one word.

vectors.input: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog the fox

tasks.title: Run-length encode
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. For each maximal run of identical bytes, output the byte itself followed by the run length as decimal ASCII digits. Output nothing for empty input.

tasks.title: Extract JSON field
tasks.prompt: Input is a single JSON object whose 'name' member is a JSON string containing no escape sequences. Output the raw string value of 'name' (no quotes, no trailing newline). The object may contain other members in any order; whitespace may vary.

tasks.title: Dedupe lines
tasks.prompt: Split input on 0x0A newlines into lines (a missing trailing newline still ends a final line; a trailing newline does not create an extra empty line). Output each line the FIRST time it occurs, in order, each followed by 0x0A. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: FNV-1a 32-bit checksum
tasks.prompt: Compute the FNV-1a 32-bit hash of all input bytes (offset basis 2166136261; for each byte: hash = (hash XOR byte) * 16777619 with wrapping u32 multiplication). Output the final hash as decimal ASCII, no trailing newline.

tasks.title: Length-prefix frames
tasks.prompt: Split input on 0x0A newlines into lines (a trailing newline does not create a final empty line; a missing trailing newline still ends a final line). For each line, output a 4-byte little-endian u32 length followed by the line bytes. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: Sum CSV second column
tasks.prompt: Input is zero or more 0x0A-separated lines of the form name,value where value is a non-negative decimal integer < 1000000; empty lines must be ignored. Output the sum of the value column as decimal ASCII, no trailing newline.

tasks.title: Reverse line order
tasks.prompt: Split input on 0x0A newlines into lines (a trailing newline does not create a final empty line). Output the lines in reverse order, each followed by 0x0A. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: Second largest distinct integer
tasks.prompt: Input is non-negative decimal integers (< 1000000) separated by ASCII whitespace, containing at least two distinct values. Output the second-largest DISTINCT value as decimal ASCII, no trailing newline.

tasks.title: ROT13 letters
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Apply ROT13 to ASCII letters (a-z and A-Z rotate by 13 within their case); every other byte passes through unchanged.

tasks.title: Swap ASCII case
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Swap the case of ASCII letters (a-z -> A-Z and A-Z -> a-z); every other byte passes through unchanged.

tasks.title: Strip trailing line whitespace
tasks.prompt: Split input on 0x0A newlines into lines (a trailing newline does not create a final empty line; a missing trailing newline still ends a final line). Remove trailing spaces (0x20) and tabs (0x09) from each line. Output each stripped line followed by 0x0A. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: Collapse space runs
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Replace every maximal run of one or more 0x20 space bytes with a single 0x20 space. All other bytes pass through unchanged.

tasks.title: Count bytes
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Output the total number of input bytes as decimal ASCII digits with no trailing newline.

tasks.title: Remove ASCII vowels
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Output the same bytes with every ASCII vowel removed (a, e, i, o, u in both lower and upper case). All other bytes pass through unchanged.

tasks.title: Sort integers
tasks.prompt: Input is zero or more non-negative decimal integers (< 1000000) separated by ASCII whitespace. Output the integers sorted ascending, separated by single 0x20 spaces, no trailing newline. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: Unique sorted integers
tasks.prompt: Input is zero or more non-negative decimal integers (< 1000000) separated by ASCII whitespace. Output the DISTINCT integers sorted ascending, separated by single 0x20 spaces, no trailing newline. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: Most frequent integer
tasks.prompt: Input is one or more non-negative decimal integers (< 1000000) separated by ASCII whitespace. Output the most frequently occurring integer as decimal ASCII, no trailing newline; break frequency ties by the smallest value.

tasks.title: Running sum
tasks.prompt: Input is zero or more non-negative decimal integers (< 1000000) separated by ASCII whitespace. Output the cumulative running sum: after reading each integer, output the sum so far as decimal ASCII followed by 0x0A. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: Integer histogram
tasks.prompt: Input is zero or more non-negative decimal integers (< 1000000) separated by ASCII whitespace. For each DISTINCT value in ascending order, output 'value:count' (value decimal, a single 0x3A colon, count decimal) followed by 0x0A. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: Decode length-prefixed frames
tasks.prompt: Input is zero or more frames concatenated. Each frame is a 4-byte little-endian u32 length L followed by exactly L payload bytes. The input is well-formed (no truncation). Output each frame's payload followed by 0x0A, in order. Empty input produces empty output.

tasks.title: Base64 encode
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Output their standard Base64 encoding (RFC 4648, alphabet A-Za-z0-9+/, with '=' padding), no trailing newline.

tasks.title: Base64 decode
tasks.prompt: Input is a valid standard Base64 string (RFC 4648, with '=' padding, no whitespace). Output the decoded raw bytes.

tasks.title: Hex encode
tasks.prompt: Read all input bytes. Output their lowercase hexadecimal encoding (two hex digits per byte, 0-9a-f), no trailing newline.

tasks.title: Hex decode
tasks.prompt: Input is an even-length lowercase hexadecimal string (0-9a-f, no whitespace). Output the decoded raw bytes.

tasks.title: CRC-32 checksum
tasks.prompt: Compute the CRC-32 (IEEE 802.3 / zlib variant: polynomial 0xEDB88320, initial value 0xFFFFFFFF, final XOR 0xFFFFFFFF, reflected) of all input bytes. Output the 32-bit result as decimal ASCII, no trailing newline.

tasks.title: JSON array length
tasks.prompt: Input is a single well-formed JSON array (the top-level value is an array). Output the number of top-level elements as decimal ASCII, no trailing newline. Elements may be any JSON value; nesting and whitespace vary.
